stories.title: Joyful Journeys Baby Loungers: CPSC Warning After Company Goes Out of Business

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
⚠️ CPSC WARNING: Joyful Journeys Baby Loungers are a fall and entrapment hazard — and the company is OUT OF BUSINESS.

No refund is coming. Stop using it now and dispose of it.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
9,300 Joyful Journeys Baby Loungers sold on Amazon and Walmart, 2023–2025.

The company recalled them in January — then went out of business before refunds went out.

CPSC: stop using, dispose immediately. cpsc.gov

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Joyful Journeys Baby Loungers: CPSC Warning After Company Goes Out of Business

stories.title: AAP Updates Drowning Prevention Guidelines for Summer 2026

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
America's pediatricians updated drowning prevention guidelines this summer.

The verdict: no single method is enough. You need layers — swim lessons, pool fencing, life jackets, AND a designated water watcher.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Drowning is the No. 1 cause of death for US kids ages 1–4.

The AAP says swim lessons can be considered after age 1 — but supervision is non-negotiable. One adult. No phone. Eyes on the water.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: AAP Updates Drowning Prevention Guidelines for Summer 2026: What Colorado Springs Parents Need to Know

stories.title: Aspen Acres Fire: Air Quality Alert for Colorado Springs Families

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
The Aspen Acres Fire is 35% contained — but Colorado's air quality is still ranked among the worst in the world.

If your kids have asthma or breathing issues, keep them inside today. Limit outdoor play for everyone.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
98,000+ acres. 780+ structures destroyed. And wildfire smoke is still blanketing Colorado Springs.

Keep windows closed. Run your air purifier. Check inciweb.wildfire.gov for the latest on the Aspen Acres Fire.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Aspen Acres Fire: Air Quality Alert for Colorado Springs Families

stories.title: COS Back-to-School Dates 2026–27: D49, D11, and D20 First Day Calendars

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
COS back-to-school dates for 2026–27:

🎒 D49: August 4 (new students Aug 3)
🎒 D11: August 12
🎒 D20: August 13

Three weeks for some of you. Start planning.

stories.title: Pikes Peak or Bust Rodeo Opens Tomorrow — July 14–18 at Norris Penrose

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Pikes Peak or Bust Rodeo starts TOMORROW — July 14–18 at Norris Penrose Event Center.

Evening shows at 7:30 PM nightly. Matinees Fri & Sat at 12:30 PM. Tickets from ~$57 at pikespeakorbust.org

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Pikes Peak or Bust Rodeo 2026: Dates, Times, and What to Expect
